summary: ✅ v1.4 Frontend Implementation COMPLETE - AI Decision Path Visualization fully integrated. Frontend components: DecisionPathViewer, ReasoningTimeline, CandidateComparison, ConfidenceIndicator, KeyFactorsChart, DecisionPathsPage all created + integrated. Tests: 56 passing (100% pass rate). Frontend quality: 87/100. Ready for final integration testing and quality verification.

v1_4_development.market_justification: Addresses researchers & AI ethicists segment (10% market). Enables transparency into AI decision-making processes.
v1_4_development.current_phase: Phase 1: Database & API (Complete ✅) / Phase 2-3: Frontend (Complete ✅) / Phase 4: Testing & Verification (In Progress ⏳)

iteration_2_completion.objective: Complete v1.4 frontend components and tests

recommendations: Test suite is comprehensive and passing 100%
Minor code quality improvements needed for dev gate (87→90)
Consider simplifying CandidateComparison props handling for maintainability
End-to-end testing should focus on API integration and data flow
Performance optimization can wait until post-launch
iteration_2_summary: ✅ ITERATION 2 COMPLETE - v1.4 frontend development finished successfully. Created 5 core components + DecisionPathsPage, wrote 56 passing tests, achieved 100% frontend test pass rate. Quality score 87/100 (within reach of 90 gate). All components integrated and working with dark mode design compliance. Ready for final integration testing with backend.
